description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] Airtable Web API via a Personal Access Token — list bases, read table schemas, query and create records. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

credentialFields.name: personalAccessToken
credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.description: Create at https://airtable.com/create/tokens. Scopes: data.records:read, schema.bases:read, user.email:read (and data.records:write for creating records). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

tools.name: airtable_whoami
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's id and granted scopes.

tools.name: airtable_list_bases
tools.description: List the bases the token can access (id, name, permissionLevel). Returns up to 1000; paginate with offset.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination cursor returned in a previous response.

tools.name: airtable_get_base_schema
tools.description: Get the schema (tables, fields, views) of a base.

tools.name: airtable_list_records
tools.description: List records from a table. Returns records[] and an offset cursor for the next page.

params.name: maxRecords
params.description: Maximum total records to return across pages.

params.name: view
params.description: View id or name to apply its filters/sort/visible fields.

params.name: filterByFormula
params.description: Airtable formula to filter records, e.g. {Status}='Done'.

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination cursor returned in a previous response.

tools.name: airtable_get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by id.

tools.name: airtable_create_record
tools.description: Create one or more records in a table.
